title: Smart Study Assistant
description: Turn pasted notes or textbook text into summaries, key points, and practice questions with Python, Streamlit, and the OpenAI API—beginner-friendly active recall in one step.

title: Smart Q&A Bot for Your Notes
description: Turn personal notes into an interactive Q&A system: chunk and overlap text, embed locally with Hugging Face, store in Chroma, and answer with LangChain RAG and Groq—no embedding API key.

title: AI Email Reply Generator
description: Paste an email, pick a tone (Formal, Friendly, Short), and get a Groq-powered draft reply—Express API plus vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, no frontend build.

title: Resume & Cover Letter Improver
description: Beginner-friendly project: resume plus job description for AI feedback (strengths, gaps, STAR bullets, ATS keywords) and a tailored cover letter—Python, Streamlit, Groq API, and pypdf.

title: Website RAG Chatbot
description: Intermediate project: paste a URL to scrape, chunk, and embed page text locally (Hugging Face + Chroma), then chat via LangChain RAG and Groq—Python and Streamlit.

title: AI Product Description Generator
description: Beginner-friendly project that turns structured product inputs into descriptions, taglines, social blurbs, and benefit-led bullets using Python, Streamlit, and the Groq API.
